\tzpentry{ID3303}{Gyromagnetic Eigenvalue}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3303 introduces Gyromagnetic Eigenvalue as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \lambda_g = \frac{ \mu_0 \gamma_ \text{gyro}}{c_s} \left( \frac{ \partial \chi_m}{ \partial \rho} \right) \end{equation}
